response_body.name: RunGood $25K John Deere Classic - Total Strokes
response_body.rules:
-1 fantasy points for each stroke under par
0 fantasy points for a par
1 fantasy point for each stroke over par
8 fantasy points for missed or incomplete rounds
Worst scoring golfer does not count towards the score
response_body.short_rules:
Select 6 golfers, and your top 5 will count towards your score. Each golfer accumulates fantasy points for their performance (score) on each hole. Golfers will be awarded a penalty for each round missed (Withdrawal, Missed Cut, etc). Consider the golfers’ injury status when selecting your lineup, as your lineup will lock when the tournament starts. Lowest score at the end of the contest wins. See the “Rules” section for more specifics on scoring and the “Prizes” section for more specifics on payouts!

This contest was created by a Splash Employee.
response_body.roster_requirements: Entrants will be required to select 1 golfer from each of the 6 tiers to fill their roster. The 1 golfer with the highest score for the tournament will not count towards the entrant's score.

statusNotificationMessage: " has withdrawn from the upcoming PGA tournament. Adjust your picks before lock!"

notes: Long tee-time arrays trimmed to the first two rounds; payout_settings omitted for fixture compactness.
